fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the current resource journal.
To see the templates that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the resource journal line number.
This field is filled in automatically and uses the number to keep track of the various lines in the journal.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies an entry type for each line.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number for the journal line.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you want to assign.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource that you want to post an entry for.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the resource group that this resource is assigned to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description or name of the resource you chose in the Resource No. field.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item or resource specified on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost for this journal line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price on the journal line.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the journal.
This field is automatically filled in.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the batch that is associated with this entry.
To see the available batches, choose the field.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Recurring Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies what happens to the quantity on the journal line after posting.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date when a recurring journal can be posted.

fields.name: Recurring Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies a recurring frequency if you have indicated in the Recurring field of the Res. Journal Template the journal is recurring.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that is used to assign a document number to the journal line when it is posted. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, choose the field.
The number series code is automatically copied from the Posting No. Series field on the journal batch. You can change the code.
If this field is blank when you post the line, the document number in the Document No. field is also used on the posted line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base quantity per resource base unit of measure that is specified in the Qty. per Unit of Measure field.

fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows which type of order that the entry was created in. You can select from the following options:

<Blank> when the entry comes from any other transaction than the following options

Production

Transfer

Service

Assembly

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the order that created the entry.
The type of order is defined by the related Order Type field.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.
The type of order is defined by the related Order Type field.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Time Sheet No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a time sheet.

fields.name: Time Sheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number for a time sheet.

fields.name: Time Sheet Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when a time sheet is created.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that an entry has been created by Microsoft Dynamics NAV and is related to the resource journal entry. The check box is selected automatically.

This field is used internally.
